docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUGNANI, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT LAGOMARSINO, EDNA RYAN, KEITH ANTHONY'S RESTAURANT DOES 1 TO 50 INCLUSIVE CHARLIE RIVEZZO LOBSTER COMPANY SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-08-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-23-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-21-1998

STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUGNANI, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-15-1998, OFF CALENDAR DEC 15,1998 POS OSC.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-08-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR DEFAULT; OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ROBERT DICKRELL HEARING SET FOR FEB-10-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-10-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ROBERT DICKRELL, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-25-1999 CONTINUED FROM FEB-10-1999 TO MAR-31-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN, KEITH
